overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's dense urban center. The player navigates a neon-lit street canyon with towering buildings, passing under pedestrian overpasses and through the Kabayan Foods archway to reach a sunlit intersection.

events.description: futuristic black car drives past from left to right across the intersection
camera begins walking forward along the sidewalk away from the intersection

agents.ego_description: starting to walk along the city sidewalk from the intersection, passing a steam vent

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with yellow text reading TOUCH MOUTH on dark building facade
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the street
sleek black futuristic sedan with glowing headlights driving past

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a futuristic city intersection with towering cyberpunk buildings. A sleek black car drives past as the camera begins walking along the sidewalk, passing a steam vent and approaching a large billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway between towering cyberpunk buildings with neon advertisements

events.description: moving from open intersection into enclosed street canyon with overhead structures and neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk with neon signs and billboards visible on both sides

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: multiple glowing digital advertisements and holographic displays on building walls
elevated walkway structure spanning the street ahead with green structural elements
steam venting from ground level manhole cover on the street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow street canyon between massive buildings. Neon billboards and digital advertisements line the walls as the camera walks along the sidewalk. A pedestrian overpass is visible ahead, and steam rises from a street vent.

scene_state.functional_zone: area beneath green structural overpass with heavy neon signage and darker lighting

events.description: entering darker area under the green overpass structure with artificial neon lighting becoming dominant

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass structure with green support beams and railings visible overhead

entered.detail: green painted metal beams, walkways, and support columns overhead
red neon sign reading KABAYAN FOODS on the archway ahead
string of red paper lanterns hanging outside a storefront

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the green metal overpass structure, the lighting becomes darker and more artificial. The red neon sign for Kabayan Foods becomes visible in the distance, and red lanterns hang on the left side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway passing under Kabayan Foods archway with cherry blossom tree and approaching intersection

events.description: approaching and passing under the Kabayan Foods archway into brighter light at the intersection
slight turn to the right while approaching the intersection crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection passing under the red neon archway with other pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead toward the intersection exit

entered.detail: pink flowering tree in a planter on the sidewalk
large structural archway with red Kabayan Foods neon signage overhead

segments.scene_description: Passing under the Kabayan Foods archway, a pink cherry blossom tree becomes visible on the left. The scene brightens as the camera approaches the open intersection ahead, with pedestrians walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with crosswalk, traffic signals, and waiting pedestrians

events.description: approaching crosswalk with traffic lights and vehicles passing through the intersection

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection to approach the crosswalk while observing traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket and cap waiting at the crosswalk edge

entered.detail: tall traffic signal post with multiple lights and crosswalk signals
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into bright sunlight at the intersection, the camera turns right toward the crosswalk. A traffic light stands on the left while pedestrians wait at the crossing, and vehicles pass through the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dense, neon-lit urban canyon into a bright, sun-drenched city intersection. It begins at a futuristic crossing where a sleek black car speeds past, moving along a sidewalk past steam vents and towering billboards. As the camera pushes deeper into the narrow street canyon, the environment becomes more enclosed by massive buildings and digital advertisements before passing beneath the shadow of a green metal overpass. The scene then shifts toward a red-lit corridor marked by hanging lanterns and the Kabayan Foods archway, where a pink cherry blossom tree appears as the lighting begins to brighten. Finally, the camera exits the covered walkway into brilliant sunlight, turning right toward a bustling crosswalk filled with waiting pedestrians and passing vehicles.
